Response

Source: R/response.R
Response.Rd

Response returned from Arctos.

Response$set_start_index(start)

Method to_records()

Usage

Response$to_records(start = 0)

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

Response$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
